payload.answer: Update the existing memory for Sam from Goldman: current preference is early Coltrane; the prior Bill Evans preference is superseded and should no longer be treated as current.

Mark the Bill Evans preference as explicitly negated/superseded rather than current.
Link the correction to the same Sam from Goldman entity to avoid duplicate person records.
